data.content:
Implemented in worktree branch `codex/remove-setlist-beat-preview`.
Commit: `e7365c04ea7ee99e5554f9544661e0406707de39`
Validation: `bun run vitest run src/components/__tests__/setlist-view.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/setlist-query-key-contract.test.ts src/lib/__tests__/setlist-chart.test.ts`, `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build` all passed in `/Users/cartine/foolery/.worktrees/remove-setlist-beat-preview`.
Summary: removed the unselected-only beat preview rows from setlist summary cards, kept selected and unselected cards on one shared body path, and added regression coverage for the card plus a source contract guarding against the old conditional branch.
